creator: xxjack12xx@gmail.com
text:
The re driver works on FreeBSD 6.1 using a TrendNet TEG-BUSR 10/100/1000
pccard network card plugged into a gateway lapop but does not work on
FreeBSD 6.2. It is recognized at startup, but disables itself right after
it is recognized.  It does not show up even if you type ifconfig.  I don't
have the dmesg output because I could not get it off of the laptop.  If
it is helpful, I will include the dmesg output of the network card from 6.1 
and 6.2.

How-To-Repeat: Use FreeBSD 6.1 re driver with a TrendNet TEG-BUSR pccard network card.
It works, but not on FreeBSD 6.2.
